zh.lifeSummary: 當Pernel Butler於1332年出生在愛爾蘭庫迪 克里時，她的父親James Butler 1st Earl of Ormond28歲，母親Eleanor de Bohun28歲。她與Sir Gilbert Talbot 3rd Lord Talbot結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1368年4月23日在英國賀福爾賀福德享年36歲，埋葬在英國賀福爾賀福德。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Pernel Butler于1332年出生在爱尔兰庫迪 克里时，她的父亲James Butler 1st Earl of Ormond28岁，母亲Eleanor de Bohun28岁。她与Sir Gilbert Talbot 3rd Lord Talbot结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1368年4月23日在英国賀福爾賀福德享年36岁，埋葬在英国賀福爾賀福德。

nameMeanings.name: Butler
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: from a word that originally denoted a wine steward, usually the chief servant of a medieval household, from Norman French butuiller (Old French bouteillier, Latin buticularius, from buticula ‘bottle’). In the large households of royalty and the most powerful nobility, the title came to denote an officer of high rank and responsibility, only nominally concerned with the supply of wine, if at all. As well as being widespread in England, this is also the surname of an important Irish family, descended from Theobald FitzWalter, who was appointed Chief Butler of Ireland by King Henry II in 1177. It is Gaelicized as de Buitléir.

English: occasionally perhaps an occupational name from Middle English boteler ‘maker of bottles (usually of leather)’, a derivative of Middle English botel, Old French bo(u)teille ‘bottle’ and synonymous with Botelmaker.
Americanized form of French   Bouthillier   (see   Bouteiller  ).

variants.name: Buttler
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of   Butler  .
German: occupational name for a village tavern owner, from French bouteillier ‘butler’.
Americanized form of German Buttlar: habitational name from a place so named in Thuringia.

variants.name: Bouthillier
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Andre, Armand, Jacques, Normand, Philippe, Yves.
French: variant of   Bouteiller  . This name is sometimes Americanized as   Butler  . Compare   Boutilier  .

nameMeanings.name: Pernel
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Common medieval simplified form of   Petronel  , occasionally revived in modern times as a given name.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Pernel Butler was born in 1332, in County Kerry, Ireland, her father, James Butler 1st Earl of Ormond, was 28 and her mother, Eleanor de Bohun, was 28. She married Sir Gilbert Talbot 3rd Lord Talbot. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. She died on 23 April 1368, in Hereford, Herefordshire, England, at the age of 36, and was buried in Hereford, Herefordshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Pernel Butler est née en 1332, à County Kerry, Irlande, son père, James Butler 1st Earl of Ormond, avait 28 ans et sa mère, Eleanor de Bohun, avait 28 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Gilbert Talbot 3rd Lord Talbot. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée le 23 avril 1368, à Hereford, Herefordshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 36 ans, et a été enterrée à Hereford, Herefordshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Pernel Butler 1332 in County Kerry, Irland geboren wurde, war ihr Vater James Butler 1st Earl of Ormond 28 und ihre Mutter Eleanor de Bohun 28. Sie hat Sir Gilbert Talbot 3rd Lord Talbot geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb am 23. April 1368 im Alter von 36 Jahren in Hereford, Herefordshire, England und wurde in Hereford, Herefordshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Pernel Butler è nata il nel 1332 nel County Kerry, Irlanda, sua padre, James Butler 1st Earl of Ormond, aveva 28 anni e sua madre, Eleanor de Bohun, aveva 28 anni. Lei sposato Sir Gilbert Talbot 3rd Lord Talbot. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia. Morì il 23 aprile 1368, nel Hereford, Herefordshire, England, all'età di 36 anni, e fu sepolta a Hereford, Herefordshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Pernel Butlerが1332年にアイルランドコウントイ ケリーで生まれた時，父James Butler 1st Earl of Ormondは28歳，母Eleanor de Bohunは28歳であった。Sir Gilbert Talbot 3rd Lord Talbotと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1368年4月23日にイギリスハーエフォードシュアイアハーエフォードで36歳で死去し，イギリスハーエフォードシュアイアハーエフォードにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Pernel Butler(이)가 1332년 아일랜드 카운티 케리에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 James Butler 1st Earl of Ormond(은)는 28세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Eleanor de Bohun(은)는 28세였다. 그녀는 Sir Gilbert Talbot 3rd Lord Talbot(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1368년 4월 23일 영국 허퍼드실르 허퍼드에서 36세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 허퍼드실르 허퍼드에 묻혔다.

mn.Aldgate, London, England, United Kingdom: Aldgate, London, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Pernel Butler nasceu em 1332, em County Kerry, Irlanda, seu pai, James Butler 1st Earl of Ormond, tinha 28 anos e sua mãe, Eleanor de Bohun, tinha 28 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir Gilbert Talbot 3rd Lord Talbot. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 23 de abril de 1368, em Hereford, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, com 36 anos, e foi sepultada em Hereford, Herefordshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Pernel Butler родилась в 1332 г. в местности коунти кирри, Ирландия, её отцу по имени James Butler 1st Earl of Ormond было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Eleanor de Bohun, 28. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Gilbert Talbot 3rd Lord Talbot. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла 23 апреля 1368 г. в местности хирефорд, хирефордшир, Англия в возрасте 36 лет и была похоронена в местности хирефорд, хирефордшир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Pernel Butler nació en 1332, en County Kerry, Irlanda, su papá, James Butler 1st Earl of Ormond, tenía 28 años y su mamá, Eleanor de Bohun, tenía 28 años. Se casó con Sir Gilbert Talbot 3rd Lord Talbot. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija. Murió el 23 de abril de 1368, en Hereford, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 36 años, y fue sepultada en Hereford, Herefordshire, Inglaterra.
